content:
```json
{
  "risk": "MEDIUM",
  "riskReason": "Workflow reminder deletion logic now lacks scheduled status checks and contains type misuse in Promise handling that could leave orphaned reminders in the database.",
  "circularTests": {
    "detected": false,
    "count": 0,
    "total": 0,
    "details": ""
  },
  "findings": [
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "category": "logic-error",
      "file": "packages/features/bookings/lib/handleCancelBooking.ts",
      "line": 487,
      "title": "Removed scheduled status check before deletion",
      "description": "The original code checked `if (reminder.scheduled && reminder.referenceId)` before calling delete functions. The new code removes the `reminder.scheduled` check, causing the code to attempt deletion of reminders that were never scheduled (referenceId may be null/undefined). This could cause silent failures or attempt to delete non-existent scheduled jobs.",
      "suggestion": "Restore the scheduled status check: `if (reminder.scheduled && reminder.referenceId)` before calling deleteScheduledEmailReminder/deleteScheduledSMSReminder"
    },
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "category": "type-error",
      "file": "packages/features/ee/workflows/api/scheduleEmailReminders.ts",
      "line": 54,
      "title": "Incorrect type in Promise.all array",
      "description": "The array `workflowRemindersToDelete` contains Prisma query objects (not Promise types), but they are passed to `Promise.all()` which expects Promise instances. The type annotation `Prisma.Prisma__WorkflowReminderClient<WorkflowReminder, never>[]` is incorrect—prisma.workflowReminder.delete() returns a Promise, not a client type. This causes type mismatch and may result in the deletion queries not executing.",
      "suggestion": "Change the type to `Promise<WorkflowReminder>[]` and ensure each delete query is properly awaited or collected as a Promise before passing to Promise.all()"
    },
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "category": "data-consistency",
      "file": "packages/features/bookings/lib/handleNewBooking.ts",
      "line": 966,
      "title": "Uncaught error in workflow reminder deletion silently logged",
      "description": "The try-catch block around workflow reminder deletion only logs errors but doesn't prevent the rescheduled booking from being created. If reminder deletion fails, the old reminders remain in the system and will still trigger, potentially sending duplicate notifications for the rescheduled booking.",
      "suggestion": "Either re-throw the error to prevent booking rescheduling, or implement a fallback mechanism to mark reminders as cancelled in the database to prevent them from being processed"
    }
  ]
}
```
